releases.name: Halfday Rune v0.6.4

releases.author: halfday-dev
releases.description:
# Halfday Rune v0.6.3

First public release. Closes the v0 development milestone (v0.5 + v0.6) and is the version submitted to the Obsidian community plugin catalog.

## What's in v0.6.3

- Born-encrypted notes (`Halfday Rune: New private note`) — plaintext never on disk
- Encrypt existing notes (`Halfday Rune: Encrypt current note → .age`) with round-trip verification before deletion
- Decrypt back to `.md` (`Halfday Rune: Decrypt current .age → .md`) with both "atomic" and "scratch" modes
- Multi-recipient encryption via `~/.age/recipients.txt` (one age1 public key per line); decryption uses any matching identity
- Rotate vault keys (`Halfday Rune: Rotate vault keys`) re-encrypts every `.age` file to your current recipients list, with optional pre-rotation `tar.gz` backup
- Live-preview rendering inside the encrypted view — headings, bold/italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, lists, links, wikilinks all render the way they do in any other Obsidian note
- Sanitization: raw HTML rendered as text (never executed); `javascript:` / `data:` / `vbscript:` / `blob:` / `file:` URL schemes inert; remote images blocked from auto-load; transclusion (`![[...]]`) rendered as inert literal text
- Custom CodeMirror view: cleartext never touches Obsidian's metadata cache, search index, or backlinks graph

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` (attached below) into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/halfday-obsidian-rune/`. Restart Obsidian, enable in Settings → Community plugins, configure your age recipients in the plugin settings.

(Once accepted into the community catalog, install will work via Browse community plugins.)

## License

Apache 2.0

## Security disclosure

hello@halfday.dev
releases.name: Halfday Rune v0.6.3
